# Comparison matrix page

## When to use

Use for vendor-aware buyers.

## Why it works

Makes evaluation easier.

## Mechanism

Reduces cognitive load and frames criteria.

## Required inputs

Feature table, tradeoffs, best-fit guidance.

## When not to use

If dishonest or vague.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Matrix engagement, demo conversions.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
